title: eulophia dahliana
intro: Eulophia dahliana, also known as the Green and Gold, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eulophia dahliana include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion. Eulophia dahliana can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
